subparts.text: What are the approaches to managing diversity in the workplace? 5 C02
How does culture impact compensation policies. 5 C03
Describe the role of assessment centers in training. 5 C04

questions.question_text: A French employee is struggling to adapt to workplace culture in Japan. Suggest a framework for expatriate adjustment. C01
You're asked to design a recruitment plan for a new global project. How would you decide between hiring PCNs, HCNs, or TCNs? C01
Design a one-day diversity training session for a culturally mixed team in a US-based firm. C02
Your firm wants to improve team building in global virtual teams. What training strategies would you propose? C02
An expatriate in Brazil complains about unfair performance appraisal. How can you resolve this considering cultural differences? C03
Your company wants to choose between “going rate” and “balance sheet” compensation approaches. Justify your choice with examples. C03
Design a repatriation strategy for an Indian manager returning from a 3-year stint in Europe. C04
Labour unions are protesting unequal treatment in a foreign-owned subsidiary in India. As HR, how will you manage this? C04
